title: Portolan Catalog Versions Index
description: Schema for the root-level versions.json that indexes collection sync state. Different from collection-level versions.json.

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when catalog was initialized

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when catalog data was last updated (i.e. the last `add`). Distinct from per-collection `synced_at`, which tracks the last push to cloud storage.

collections.description: Map of collection IDs to their state

updated.description: When this collection's data was last updated locally (i.e. the last `add`)

synced_at.description: When this collection was last synced to cloud storage (i.e. the last `push`)

asset_count.description: Number of assets in the current version of this collection

total_size_bytes.description: Total size in bytes of the assets in the current version of this collection
